traits.locale_text: The creature gains +80% fire damage reduction, +3 deflection, +20% armour durability, +25% damage, +25% armour penetration, +25% dodge reduction, and +1 MP.

languages.text: このクリーチャーは{g|Encyclopedia:FireDamage}火ダメージ{/g}を80%軽減、{g|Encyclopedia:Deflection}防御{/g}を3、{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}アーマー{/g}を20%、ダメージを25%、{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}を25%、{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeReduction}回避率{/g}を25%減らします。さらに、{g|Encyclopedia:MovementPoints}MP{/g}を1増やします。
